steps.title: Locate the intersection point on the graph
steps.content: To solve a system of equations graphically, we find the point where the two graphs intersect. On the provided graph, the V-shaped absolute value function (with vertex at $(3, 2)$) and the straight-line linear function cross at a single point on the left side of the V.

steps.title: Read the coordinates and select the choice
steps.content: Reading the coordinates of the intersection point directly from the grid: the intersection occurs at $x = 1$ and $y = 5$. Therefore, the solution to the system is $(1, 5)$. This matches choice C — C is correct.
